description: Region presets for the WM1303 installation wizard. Each preset defines ONLY the regulatory region and a recommended RF center frequency. Channels are NOT pre-configured — users configure channels after installation via the Channels tab in the WM1303 Manager UI.
note_for_ui: Presets are install-time only. After install, the user configures channels manually. The rf_center_freq_mhz is the default SX1302 radio_0 center frequency for the region.

presets.name: EU868
presets.description: Europe 863-870 MHz ISM band (SRD). Center frequency in the 869 MHz sub-band.

presets.name: US915
presets.description: North America 902-928 MHz ISM band. Center frequency in the 915 MHz uplink segment.

presets.name: AU915
presets.description: Australia / Brazil 915-928 MHz ISM band. Center frequency for the AU-Mid community standard (915.075 MHz channel).

presets.name: AS923
presets.description: Asia 915-928 MHz (sub-regions AS923-1/2/3/4 vary). Center frequency for AS923-1.

presets.name: IN865
presets.description: India 865-867 MHz ISM band. Center frequency in the middle of the band.

presets.name: JP920
presets.description: Japan 920-928 MHz (ARIB STD-T108). Center frequency for common JP sub-band.

presets.name: KR920
presets.description: South Korea 920.9-923.3 MHz. Center frequency in the middle of the band.

presets.name: Custom
presets.description: User-defined frequency limits. Set the RF center frequency and TX bounds manually after installation.
